name: Coastal Calm
flavorHeadline: Bright cilantro, crisp poblano, sun-ripened tomato, and a squeeze of lime that pulls everything coastal
heatDescriptor: A gentle gust — big flavor, little fire
jarImageAlt: Jar of Tomato Warning Coastal Calm EF-1 salsa with a golden-yellow label
productStory: Golden hour on the Gulf. The window is open, salt air drifts through the kitchen, and the sky hasn't decided what it's doing yet. Coastal Calm lives in that stillness — sun-ripened Florida tomatoes, crisp poblano you can hear when you bite into it, cilantro so fresh it fills the room before you taste it, and a squeeze of lime that makes everything sing. Every ingredient is visible in the jar and honest on the tongue. 500 to 1,500 SHU — a whisper of warmth, nothing more. This is not the absence of power. It is power at rest.
pairings: Blackened fish tacos with citrus slaw
Fresh oysters on the half shell
Chips — the good ones — and guacamole
